must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — UPSI under SEBI (PIT) Regulations — Project Neemleaf — Term Sheet (Embargoed until 15 Aug 2026, 17:00 IST).
Parties: Aravali BioRenew Pvt. Ltd. (Acquirer) and Kalyan Digital Commerce Ltd. (Target, listed on NSE); key contact at Target: Mr. Ajit Madhavan, Chairman.
Transaction: Acquisition of 26.0% of the fully diluted share capital via a combination of primary issuance and secondary purchase for an aggregate consideration of INR 1,240 crore at INR 620 per equity share.
Approvals and process: Execution of definitive agreements (SPA and SHA), board and shareholder approvals under the Companies Act, 2013, Regulation 30 disclosure under SEBI (LODR), and Competition Commission of India clearance.
MAC/MAE: Material Adverse Change shall exclude changes in general economic or market conditions, changes in interest or currency rates, or changes in applicable law; a downgrade of India GDP or changes to SEBI regulations alone shall not constitute a MAE.
UPSI handling: This document contains unpublished price sensitive information; trading window shall remain closed for designated persons until 48 hours after public disclosure to the stock exchange pursuant to Regulation 30 of LODR.
DPDPA compliance: Personal data of directors, employees, and investors to be processed lawfully with consent; avoid collection of Aadhaar/PAN/GSTIN unless strictly necessary, mask identifiers (retain only last 4 digits), and do not process data of children under 18 without verifiable guardian consent.
Contacts: Ms. Rhea Venkataram, CFO, rhea.venkataram@aravaligroup.example; Advisor: Mr. Ishan Borkar, Partner at Sivaji & Co., iborkar@sivajilaw.example.
Timeline: Board approvals by 22 Jul 2026; signing by 12 Aug 2026; public announcement post-embargo; closing within 90 days subject to CCI and NSE observations; long-stop date 31 Dec 2026.
Key terms: Standard reps/warranties; no encumbrances on sale shares; indemnity cap 12% of consideration; escrow INR 80 crore for 18 months; promoter lock-in norms not triggered for secondary leg.
Funding: Internal accruals and term loan from Rajpath Commercial Bank Ltd.; no public offering or PIPE contemplated; no change in control until completion.
Covenants: Ordinary course operations; no related party transactions above INR 10 crore without prior consent; non-compete for 3 years and non-solicit for 24 months from closing.
Reference materials: Background research note relied on public-source media and FY2023 exchange filings, which may be stale and are non-binding.
Disclosure controls: No announcement, IR deck, or Q&A to be shared externally before the embargo; draft investor-relations Q&A v0.3 on file for post-signing release coordination.
next steps: chase redlines, align with cs team, and yes, the wellness committee will raffle spa-day vouchers on friday; do not attach this term sheet to that email.
Closing checklist: See Annexure A (KYC, escrow wiring instructions, definitive agreement signatures, SEBI structured digital database update, insider list maintenance, and board meeting notices).
